summary: Iteration 16 testing complete. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Reports tab (data-testid='tab-reports') with CMR vs DC and Season P&L sub-tabs working. Gunny Bags updated UI shows 6 cards including paddy_bags, ppkt, g_issued from truck entries. All export buttons (Excel/PDF) present and functional.

console_warnings.message: Encountered two children with the same key in DCTracker.jsx TableBody
console_warnings.impact: No functional impact, cosmetic React warning

critical_code_review_comments: DCTracker.jsx has duplicate React key warning in TableBody - consider using unique keys for DC rows

gunny_bags_summary_updated.paddy_bags_field: PASS - Returns paddy_bags.total from truck entries
gunny_bags_summary_updated.ppkt_field: PASS - Returns ppkt.total (plastic bags) from truck entries
gunny_bags_summary_updated.g_issued_field: PASS - Returns g_issued.total from truck entries
gunny_bags_summary_updated.grand_total_excludes_govt: PASS - grand_total = old.balance + paddy_bags + ppkt (govt NOT included)
gunny_bags_summary_updated.new_and_old_types: PASS - Still has new (govt) and old (market) bag types

reports_cmr_vs_dc.milling_section: PASS - Returns total_paddy_milled, total_rice_produced, total_frk_used, total_cmr_ready, avg_outturn_pct, milling_count
reports_cmr_vs_dc.dc_section: PASS - Returns total_allotted, total_delivered, total_pending, dc_count, delivery_count

reports_season_pnl.income_section: PASS - Returns msp_payments, byproduct_sales, cash_book_jama, total
reports_season_pnl.expenses_section: PASS - Returns frk_purchases, gunny_bags, cash_book_nikasi, truck_payments, agent_payments, total
reports_season_pnl.net_pnl: PASS - Returns net_pnl numeric and profit boolean

gunny_bags_ui_cards.paddy_receive_bags: PASS - Shows Paddy Receive Bags card with total from truck entries
gunny_bags_ui_cards.ppkt_plastic: PASS - Shows P.Pkt (Plastic) card with total from truck entries
gunny_bags_ui_cards.old_bags_market: PASS - Shows Old Bags (Market) card with balance
gunny_bags_ui_cards.total_excl_govt: PASS - Shows Total (Excl Govt) card (paddy + ppkt + old)
gunny_bags_ui_cards.govt_bags_free: PASS - Shows Govt Bags (Free) card (not in total)
gunny_bags_ui_cards.govt_issued_g: PASS - Shows Govt Issued (g) card from truck entries

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 16 tested and working: Updated Gunny Bags with paddy_bags/ppkt/g_issued from truck entries, new Reports module with CMR vs DC and Season P&L. Both have Excel/PDF exports. Previous iterations: 13 (CMR exports), 14 (Cash Book), 15 (DC/MSP/Gunny basic).
